## Changes Made

### Server (`/mnt/data/clungcord/packages/server/src/`)

- `listEmojis()` now orders by `use_count DESC, name` instead of just `name`
- `incrementEmojiUseCount(emojiName)` -- bumps use_count for a custom emoji by name
